message:
chore(beads): add bd-3ntwe analytics coverage task to issue tracker

Registers new bead bd-3ntwe tracking unit test coverage for CLI analytics
functions (aggregateStats, buildSessionDetails, parseTargetTypes,
updateAgentStats) as a child of the test coverage epic bd-2p6xd.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

 {"id":"bd-3no20","title":"LimitDetector: Pattern matching with configurable regex","description":"## LimitDetector: Pattern Matching with Configurable Regex

### Purpose
Implement pattern matching logic that detects usage limits in captured pane output.

### Implementation Details

**File:** Part of `internal/swarm/limit_detector.go`

**Pattern Matching:**
```go
// PatternMatcher checks output against limit patterns.
type PatternMatcher struct {
    // patterns maps agent type to compiled regexes
    patterns map[string][]*regexp.Regexp
}

// NewPatternMatcher creates matcher from config.
func NewPatternMatcher(limitPatterns map[string][]string) *PatternMatcher {
    pm := &PatternMatcher{
        patterns: make(map[string][]*regexp.Regexp),
    }
    
    for agentType, patternStrs := range limitPatterns {
        for _, p := range patternStrs {
            // Use case-insensitive matching
            re := regexp.MustCompile("(?i)" + regexp.QuoteMeta(p))
            pm.patterns[agentType] = append(pm.patterns[agentType], re)
        }
    }
    
    return pm
}

// Match checks if output matches any pattern for the agent type.
func (pm *PatternMatcher) Match(agentType, output string) (matched bool, pattern string) {
    patterns := pm.patterns[agentType]
    for _, re := range patterns {
        if re.MatchString(output) {
            return true, re.String()
        }
    }
    return false, ""
}
```

**Default Patterns:**
```go
var DefaultLimitPatterns = map[string][]string{
    "cc": {
        "You've hit your limit",
        "You have hit your limit",
        "usage limit",
        "Rate limit exceeded",
        "Please wait",
        "This conversation is getting long", // Context limit
    },
    "cod": {
        "You've hit your usage limit",
        "You have reached your usage limit",
        "Rate limit exceeded",
        "context limit reached",
    },
    "gmi": {
        "quota exceeded",
        "rate limit",
        "context window exceeded",
    },
}
```

### Logging Requirements
- Log pattern match: `[LimitDetector] pattern_matched agent_type=%s pattern=%q`
- Log no match: `[LimitDetector] no_match agent_type=%s` (debug level)

### Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Case-insensitive pattern matching
- [ ] Configurable patterns via config file
- [ ] Return matched pattern for logging
- [ ] Support both string literal and regex patterns","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-22T07:00:59.034358872Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-23T02:35:41.641621235Z","closed_at":"2026-01-23T02:35:41.641559559Z","close_reason":"done","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3no20","depends_on_id":"bd-11y0m","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3no20","depends_on_id":"bd-3lo54","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3nson","title":"Unit Tests: ntm assign command strategy selection and bead-agent matching","description":"## Test Coverage
Test the core ntm assign algorithm for strategy selection and bead-to-agent matching.

## Test Cases

### Strategy Selection
- Select balanced strategy by default
- Select speed strategy when --strategy=speed
- Select quality strategy when --strategy=quality
- Select dependency strategy when --strategy=dependency
- Select round-robin strategy when --strategy=round-robin
- Error on invalid strategy name

### Bead-to-Agent Matching
- Match beads to idle agents only
- Respect agent type filters (--cc-only, --cod-only, --gmi-only)
- Apply capability matrix for quality strategy
- Prioritize high unblock_count for dependency strategy
- Even distribution for round-robin strategy

### Edge Cases
- Zero beads available
- Zero idle agents
- More beads than agents
- More agents than beads
- Single agent, multiple beads
- Multiple agents, single bead

### Output Format
- JSON output includes assigned array
- JSON output includes skipped array with reasons
- Each assignment has pane, bead_id, agent_type

## Logging Requirements
- Log strategy selected
- Log agent pool before matching
- Log each matching decision with score/reason
- Log final assignment map

## Test File

 {"id":"bd-3o9b0","title":"Implement bead assignment integration","description":"Implement bead assignment integration with --bead flag.

## Feature
When --bead=<ID> is provided, automatically send bead assignment prompt after restart.

## Prompt Template
Read AGENTS.md, register with Agent Mail. Work on: <BEAD_ID> - <DESC>.
Use br show <BEAD_ID> for details. Use ultrathink.

## Implementation
1. Fetch bead info via br show --json
2. Format prompt with bead ID and description
3. Send prompt to pane after agent is ready
4. Return bead_assigned and prompt_sent in response

## Alternative: --prompt flag
Allow custom prompt instead of bead template for flexibility.

## Error Handling
- If bead ID doesn't exist: return error before restart
- If prompt send fails: note in response but still report restart success","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-01-19T23:25:25.108162363Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-29T01:34:29.635186608Z","closed_at":"2026-01-29T01:34:29.635053721Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3o9b0","depends_on_id":"bd-21tqw","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"}]}
 {"id":"bd-3oeov","title":"EPIC: REST API v1 (Full CLI/Robot Parity)","description":"## Summary\nExpose the full NTM feature surface via a REST API that mirrors robot mode responses and supports idempotency, jobs, and OpenAPI documentation.\n\n## Scope\n- API server scaffolding with chi router, middleware, error envelope, request IDs.\n- Core resources: system, sessions, panes, agents, output tooling, palette/history, checkpoints, metrics, context, git.\n- Tool bridges: Agent Mail + reservations, Beads/BV, CASS/CM, Scanner, Accounts, Safety, Pipelines.\n- OpenAPI 3.1 spec generation + Swagger UI at /docs.\n- Consistent envelopes + error codes aligned with robot mode.\n\n## Success Criteria\n- Every CLI/robot feature has a REST endpoint.\n- OpenAPI spec is generated from kernel and stays in sync.\n- Idempotent POSTs support Idempotency-Key.\n- Long‑running ops return job handles.\n","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"epic","created_at":"2026-01-23T22:48:20.934770050Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-01-23T23:18:27.607825603Z","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"bd-3oeov","depends_on_id":"bd-12vyy","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3oeov","depends_on_id":"bd-15amw","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3oeov","depends_on_id":"bd-1lxvl","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3oeov","depends_on_id":"bd-204ic","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3oeov","depends_on_id":"bd-2q9v1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3oeov","depends_on_id":"bd-2vzaq","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3oeov","depends_on_id":"bd-30zp4","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3oeov","depends_on_id":"bd-38p9u","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3oeov","depends_on_id":"bd-3cw6i","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3oeov","depends_on_id":"bd-3fqg9","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3oeov","depends_on_id":"bd-3hsvc","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3oeov","depends_on_id":"bd-3iomn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3oeov","depends_on_id":"bd-6z2bf","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"},{"issue_id":"bd-3oeov","depends_on_id":"bd-f8ikz","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-01-28T04:13:06Z","created_by":"import"}]}
